package.name: lite_description
package.description: Description package for the Berkeley-Humanoids Lite humanoid (variants under robots/: `lite` full-body and `lite_dummy` bimanual). Each ships xacro (ROS entry, incl. a generated <ros2_control> block), a flattened URDF and MJCF (training / deployment sim), and meshes. All artifacts are generated from Onshape CAD by the `robot_assets` Python tool; do not hand-edit them. ros2_control hardware plugins (mock / mujoco_ros2_control / humanoid_control_robstride) are referenced by pluginlib string only and are NOT build/exec dependencies of this package. This is an asset-only package: it ships no launch files or RViz configs (visualization and bringup are consumer concerns).
